verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, what a Friend Who walks besides me To hold my hand And safely guide me. Safe in His arms, He'll always hide me. Oh, what a Friend, He is to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He knows the way, My road is winding. He can see around My pathway's bending. He'll take me through When day is ending. Oh, what a Friend, He is to me.
